options.name: <shapeList>
options.description: shapeList: a polygon {{x y} {x y} ...}, rect {xl yl xu yu} or list of polygons and/or rects {{{x1 y1} {x2 y2} ...} {xl yl xu yu} ...}

options.name: -clockwise
options.description: The returned list of edges is sorted by clockwise.

options.name: -counterclockwise
options.description: The returned list of edges is sorted by counterclockwise.

options.name: -d
options.description: User specified values and return values are in database units: default is microns

options.name: -direction
options.description: The kinds of edges that are needed. This can be N, S, E, W, NE, NW, SE, SW. It can be a list For eg.: dbEdge -direction {N S NW NE} {10 20 30 40}.

options.name: -index
options.description: Specify the index number of the edge to be returned. The index number starts with 0 from the first edge specified in the shapelist, and increases in the direction along with the shapelist. You can specify a number between 0 and "the_number_of_edge - 1".
